name: Red Lobster Cheese Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450 degrees.
2. Mix bisquick, water and cheese in a large bowl until combined.
3. Drop the dough by large spoonfuls onto a greased baking sheet.
4. Bake for 8-10 minutes.
5. After removing from the oven (while still hot), brush with melted butter or margarine mixed with garlic powder, parsley flakes, and Italian seasoning. Amounts will vary depending on the batch size, but use sparingly.
6. Serve hot.
Note: For a smaller batch, use 2 cups Bisquick, 1/2 cup cold water, and 3/4 cup grated Cheddar, which will yield about 12 biscuits. You may also substitute soda water or ginger ale for the water if desired.
